3 core features:
05:23

1. SQLite task ledge:

12h © ® X

2. Receipt logging — every create, upaate, complete, ana aerete action writes an appena-only JSONL receipt.

3. Local dashboard — browser dashboard shows open tasks, completed tasks, recent receipts, and basic

productivity stats.

Tech stack:

Python 3.114

SQLite via sqlites

CLI via argparse

Dashboard via FastAPI + Jinja2
Server via uvicorn

Receipts via SONL append-only log
Packaging via pyproject.. toml.

What problem it solves:

@ Copy

TaskForge solves the “I did work but cannot prove, review, or reconstruct it later” problem. Instead of tasks living in
scattered notes, chats, terminals, and memory, it creates a local operational ledger: every task has a database record,
every action has a receipt, and the dashboard gives a fast daily/weekly view of what is pending, what changed, and what

was completed.

Ov69~
